title: ononis natrix subsp. hispanica
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. hispanica, also known as the Spanish restharrow, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Spanish restharrow include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health ailments. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
